name: ames-preferred-mcps
description: Preferred third-party MCP servers curated by Oliver Ames. Includes Apple Docs, Apple Notifier, Drafts, Excel, Google Workspace, macOS Automator, MarkItDown, Pandoc, Peekaboo, XcodeBuild, iMCP, Sim Genie, and Sosumi integrations. Run sync-sources to install or update non-npm dependencies.
